latex_blocks: $ Module[{integrand, brownian_path, partition}, (* Ito stochastic integral with quantum correction *) ∫_0^t f(s, X_s) dW_s := Limit[ Sum[ f[t_{i-1}, X_{t_{i-1}}] * (W_{t_i} - W_{t_{i-1}}), {i, 1, n} ], n $
canonical_equation.source_section_latex:
\[
$ Module[{integrand, brownian_path, partition}, (* Ito stochastic integral with quantum correction *) ∫_0^t f(s, X_s) dW_s := Limit[ Sum[ f[t_{i-1}, X_{t_{i-1}}] * (W_{t_i} - W_{t_{i-1}}), {i, 1, n} ], n $
\]
